shorts.hook: The invisible labor behind business success
shorts.content: The invisible labor of running a business extends far beyond what clients and customers see on the surface. It's about the strength it takes to hold it all, and the grace it takes to let some of it go.
shorts.title: What clients never see in your business

shorts.content: Movement isn't just fitness — it's emotional and energetic leadership that impacts every area of life. When you move your body, you're leading yourself first.
shorts.title: Why movement is actually leadership

shorts.content: Women in fitness and business spaces are often underestimated, but this can become a source of strength and motivation. Use that underestimation as fuel.
shorts.title: Turn being underestimated into your superpower

shorts.content: Sometimes leadership means knowing when to rise up and when to let go with grace. The strongest leaders know the power of both holding on and releasing.
shorts.title: The leadership skill no one talks about

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What happens when a gymnast builds a Pilates empire?
titleOptions.boldStatement: Movement is emotional leadership (Pilates owner reveals all)
titleOptions.numberBased: 7 invisible tasks behind every successful fitness business

description:
Former gymnast Paige Johnson reveals the invisible labor behind building a Pilates empire while raising a daughter. 💪
She's breaking down why movement is actually emotional leadership and how being underestimated became her superpower.

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 - Introduction to Paige Johnson
02:15 - From gymnastics to Pilates empire
08:30 - The invisible labor of business ownership
15:45 - Why women are underestimated in fitness
22:10 - Movement as emotional leadership
28:30 - Building community through shared experiences
35:20 - Technology tools for busy entrepreneurs
41:15 - Finding your personal mantra
47:30 - Leadership through holding on and letting go

🎯 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• The invisible labor of running a business extends beyond what clients see
• Women in fitness spaces are underestimated but this becomes strength
• Movement is emotional and energetic leadership impacting all life areas
• Building community creates deeper connections than traditional networking
• Finding your mantra helps balance business ownership and motherhood

📚 CONNECT WITH GUEST:
📕 Order The Manage Her (on Amazon): https://a.co/d/ej9A37z

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly leadership insights: https://www.www.youtube.com/@TheManageHer
📖 READ FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/paige-johnson-on-pilates-partnership-finding-her-mantra-through-motherhood
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/paige-johnson-on-pilates-partnership-finding-her-mantra-through-motherhood

#WomenInBusiness #PilatesStudio #FemaleEntrepreneur #BusinessLeadership #WomensFitness #InvisibleLabor #MovementLeadership #Motherhood #BusinessOwner #TheManageHer

communityPosts.content:
What's the biggest piece of invisible labor in your business that clients never see? 🤔

A) Planning and strategizing behind the scenes
B) Administrative tasks and bookkeeping
C) Marketing and social media management
D) Personal development and skill building

Paige Johnson (Pilates studio co-owner) just shared how the invisible work is often 80% of what makes a business successful. Drop a comment with what invisible labor takes up most of your time! 👇

"Movement isn't just fitness — it's emotional and energetic leadership" 💪

Paige Johnson dropped this truth bomb in our latest episode, and it completely shifted how I think about physical wellness.

When you move your body, you're:
✨ Leading yourself first
✨ Building emotional resilience
✨ Creating energy for everything else
✨ Modeling self-care for others

How has movement shown up as leadership in your life? Share below! 👇

(Full episode link in bio)
